active.title: ✅ Jason's Crypto Signals — Permanent Fix: Zero Telegram → 18/Cycle
active.notes: Problem: 5-min cooldown created 4-5 min dead windows every cycle (Jason noticed at 10:59). Solution: 120s cooldown + self-healing watchdog + DEX null fix. Result: 18 alerts per cycle, continuous rotation, auto-recovery on silence. Thresholds: Jason's ≥45, GOD Signal ≥60.

active.title: 🎯 Crypto Signals — Win Rate Tracker LIVE

active.title: 🚀 Crypto Signals — 1000x Improvement Plan (Phase 2-4)
active.notes: Phase 1 complete (all critical issues fixed + permanent safeguards). Phase 2-4 awaiting Jason's approval: (2) Win rate dashboard + macro filter, (3) OKX/Bybit funding + whale tracking, (4) Event-driven architecture.
